source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING ENGINEER

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with leading enterprises and are backed by top investors.




THE ROLE


YOU WILL:

 - Own and scale the recruitment engine, the algorithm that finds any niche audience in the world through network traversal targeted ads, referrals, automated outbound, and anything else you can come up with.

 - Build and extend the Terac API that research tooling companies and AI data companies integrate against.

 - Ship the AI moderator, our voice agent that screens candidates, evaluates long-horizon tasks, detects cheating, and handles multi-language conversations.

 - Build marketplace systems: opportunity routing, pricing optimization, expert LTV modeling, and feasibility estimation.

 - Design the expert network experience, including onboarding flows, opportunity matching, payouts, and trust systems that make experts want to stay on the platform.

 - Work directly with the CTO to shape technical direction across Next.js, TypeScript, tRPC, Drizzle, Neon Postgres, LiveKit, and the Vercel AI SDK.


YOU ARE:

 - A high-agency builder with 3+ years of fullstack experience.

 - Fluent in modern web stacks (TypeScript, React, Postgres).

 - Experienced with LLMs, voice AI, or AI SDKs (Vercel AI SDK, Gemini, LiveKit).

 - Excited by marketplace dynamics like matching, routing, pricing, and network effects.

 - Maybe a former founder or lead who is hungry to build again.


WHY NOW:

 - We are at the inflection point, shifting from a research tool into a platform company with 10+ API integrations launching in the next quarter.

 - The human data market for AI training is exploding and we have the recruitment infrastructure already built.

 - You would be joining a 10-person team with 9M in funding and a growing base of happy customers.




MISC

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, menaingful equity vested over four years, $10K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), and an additional $5k housing bonus (if you move within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you will be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You are joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member.

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with leading enterprises and are backed by top investors.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a founding account executive hire who wants to own huge pieces of the product, move fast, and help build the future of human understanding.

You’ll work directly with our CEO to design, build, and scale the systems that will make Terac a $100B company, from our sales playbook to marketing campaigns to partnerships with your favorite companies.

What You’ll Do

 - Full-Cycle Sales: Manage inbound leads, run demos, and close deals. You will be the primary driver of revenue.

 - Customer Success: Own the post-sale relationship. Onboard customers, drive adoption, and ensure they get long-term value from the platform.

 - Growth & Community: Represent Terac at conferences and events. Build relationships in the market research and product communities to drive awareness.
   
   


ABOUT YOU

You’re the kind of person who might have once tried to start a company yourself, or still might someday. You’re relentless, hands-on, and care deeply about building something meaningful.

Must-haves

 - Generalist Mindset: You are comfortable switching context between selling, supporting customers, and evangelizing the product.

 - Revenue Focused: You prioritize activities that drive growth and retention. This is not an ops role.

 - Scrappy & Autonomous: As the first GTM hire, you won’t have a playbook handed to you. You will help write it and will need to work in an unstructured environment

Nice-to-haves

 - Experience in early-stage startups or GTM/growth roles.

 - Background in the industry or selling to research and product teams.
   
   


MISC

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, menaingful equity vested over four years, $15K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), $10K housing bonus (if you live within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you'll be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You're joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member.

source_jobs.title: Founding Operations
source_jobs.description:
TERAC: THE EXPERT NETWORK POWERING FRONTIER RESEARCH

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with leading enterprises and are backed by top investors.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're looking for a founding operator to partner directly with the CEO to shape and scale the company’s core functions. You will work on the highest-priority problems in the company including managing key customer relationships, building out the founding team, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

You're someone who thrives in ambiguity, has exceptional judgment, and can context-switch between strategic planning, tactical execution, and people operations.




YOU WILL:

 - Coordinate the delivery of our highest-value projects

 - Work with the CEO to drive important business decisions

 - Oversee and orchestrate the work of 10,000s of experts on our platform

 - Ensure execution under demanding timelines

 - Diagnose bottlenecks, restructure workflows, and implement solutions that improve quality, throughput, and cost-efficiency.

 - Work with every single member of the team.
   
   


YOU HAVE/ARE:

 - Background in consulting, finance, startups, or other operationally intense environments.

 - Strong analytical and communication abilities; proven track record of managing complex projects.

 - Comfortable working directly with high-profile clients.

 - Excited by “gritty” process optimization and large-scale execution.
   
   


MISC

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, meaningful equity vested over four years, $10K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), and an additional $5k housing bonus (if you move within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you'll be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You're joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member.

source_jobs.title: Influencer Marketing Managers: Paid Interview on Creator Discovery
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE'RE RESEARCHING

We're running a paid study on the strategies marketing teams use to find and evaluate content creators. Identifying the right influencers for a campaign requires navigating a complex landscape of tools, platforms, and manual searches. We want to understand the real-world methods professionals rely on to build effective creator partnerships.


HOW IT WORKS

During this remote interview, you will walk us through your typical process for sourcing talent. You will describe the software platforms you use, how you filter potential candidates, and the criteria that drive your final selection. We will also ask you to share a recent example of a successful discovery process. The session focuses heavily on your day-to-day workflow and the practical challenges you face during campaign planning.


WHO THIS IS FOR

We welcome influencer marketing managers, brand strategists, agency campaign directors, and talent coordinators. You should have direct experience running searches for content creators and managing brand partnerships. Professionals working at either dedicated marketing agencies or in-house brand teams are encouraged to apply.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Detail your end-to-end process for sourcing content creators

 - Explain how you evaluate and vet potential influencers for specific campaigns

 - Discuss the software tools and platforms you rely on for talent discovery

 - Walk us through a recent campaign where you successfully identified new creator partners


WHO SHOULD APPLY

 - Active role in influencer marketing, brand strategy, or campaign management

 - Direct experience sourcing and selecting content creators for marketing initiatives

 - Familiarity with creator discovery platforms and manual search techniques

 - Comfortable discussing your day-to-day workflow in a remote interview


COMPENSATION

$250 one-time

 


READY TO PARTICIPATE?

Start your paid interview now https://terac.com/interview/start/r/fdd32595-c769-4402-b0eb-1b672c5601c3?utm_source=ashby_listing_description

 


ABOUT TERAC

Terac is building the world's largest pool of vetted human experts for AI. Researchers, AI labs, and product teams use Terac to recruit, screen, and pay study participants across industries, languages, and skill sets.

 

Learn more at terac.com https://terac.com or on YouTube at @jointerac https://www.youtube.com/@jointerac.

source_jobs.title: Knowledge Workers: Feedback on Digital Collaboration Tools
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE'RE RESEARCHING

We're running a paid study on the digital tools that power modern remote and hybrid work. This research feeds directly into evaluating how professionals manage their daily tasks, communicate with teams, and organize their job responsibilities. We want to understand the friction points in current workplace solutions to identify areas for improvement.


HOW IT WORKS

You will participate in a remote voice or video interview to walk us through your typical workday. We will ask you to describe the primary collaboration software you use and how you coordinate with colleagues. You will then react to early concepts for new workplace tools and share your honest feedback on their potential impact. We may also ask you to briefly screen-share to demonstrate a specific, non-confidential workflow.


WHO THIS IS FOR

We are looking for active professionals who rely heavily on digital collaboration tools to get their jobs done. We welcome project managers, team leads, software engineers, and administrative staff. You should be comfortable discussing your daily responsibilities and evaluating the software solutions your company uses.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Walk us through your daily routine and job responsibilities.

 - Describe the digital collaboration tools you currently use to communicate with your team.

 - React to new workplace solutions and evaluate their usefulness.

 - Provide honest feedback on how these tools could improve your workflow.


WHO SHOULD APPLY

 - Currently employed in a role that requires extensive use of digital collaboration tools.

 - Comfortable discussing your day-to-day workplace routines on a video call.

 - Familiar with managing tasks and communicating with team members remotely.


COMPENSATION

$40 one-time

 


READY TO PARTICIPATE?

Start your paid interview now https://terac.com/interview/start/r/37ee0d1e-4ab6-4c5f-a1fa-b2f67c7c220e?utm_source=ashby_listing_description

 


ABOUT TERAC

Terac is building the world's largest pool of vetted human experts for AI. Researchers, AI labs, and product teams use Terac to recruit, screen, and pay study participants across industries, languages, and skill sets.

 

Learn more at terac.com https://terac.com or on YouTube at @jointerac https://www.youtube.com/@jointerac.

source_jobs.title: Founding Marketing
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING MARKETING

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with leading enterprises and are backed by top investors.




THE ROLE

At Terac, we are attracting the worlds top experts in every domain. While the sales team owns the customer side of the marketplace, it will be your job to own and grow the expert side of the marketplace. This is effectively a B2C business and requires a unique understanding of targeting and growing communities in different niches.

What You’ll Do

 - Expert acquisition: build and run marketing campaigns 24/7 that are targeting the highest-leverage expert domain we need at any given moment through ads, our referral network, UGC content, or any other method you can dream up.

 - Event marketing: we host monthly dinners for AI researchers, our top experts, and hackathons for our power users. You will travel across the country and the world representing Terac to the expert community.

 - Credibility is key: Between engaging in Reddit/Discord communities, organizing roundtables, and being active in a dedicated Slack with our top experts it will be your job to drive credibility to the Terac brand and make being a Terac expert a sought after title.
   
   


ABOUT YOU

You are a fast to fail, AI-native builder. This is not a traditional marketing role where you are a glorified lead generator. We are looking for a semi-technical builder who can learn on the fly.

Must-haves:

 - No-busywork mentality: You are comfortable vibe-coding and adapting to the latest tools to optimize your work. The second you recognize a repeatable workflow, you're in Claude code automating it.

 - Bias to action: You will operate with a high-level of agency. This means not every initiative will be discussed or thought out. We're looking for someone comfortable in failure, but can come to us with a list of initiatives where you tried something, measured the impact, and either doubled down or quit - all without permission.

 - Data-driven: You make data driven decisions. Like any marketplace, problems can balloon at scale. It's vital we track LTV, CAC, and measure everything to ensure we make informed decisions.




MISC

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, menaingful equity vested over four years, $15K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), $10K housing bonus (if you live within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you'll be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You're joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member.

You're someone who thrives in ambiguity, has exceptional judgment, and can context-switch between strategic planning, tactical execution, and people operations.

source_jobs.title: Hospitality & Travel: AI Scenario Feedback Contributor
source_jobs.description:
We are inviting individuals with experience in the hospitality and travel sector to participate in an important research initiative. This study aims to gather real-world insights to help train and refine cutting-edge AI models designed to understand complex industry scenarios. Your feedback is crucial for shaping future technological advancements. During your session, you will be presented with various situations relevant to the hospitality and travel domain. Your task will be to describe how you would approach these scenarios, detailing your thought process and potential solutions. This will involve using a tool to input your responses and interact with the presented tasks. We are looking for your authentic perspective on how industry professionals navigate different challenges and opportunities. Your practical experience and nuanced understanding of the sector will provide invaluable data, ensuring these AI systems are developed with a deep appreciation for real-world complexity and human decision-making. Your contribution will directly impact the sophistication and usefulness of future AI tools.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Engage with various industry-related scenarios presented in a structured format.

 - Describe your approach and thought processes for resolving or managing situations.

 - Utilize a digital tool to input your detailed responses and interactions.

 - Contribute valuable insights that will aid in the training of AI models.

 - Share your professional perspective on challenges and solutions within the sector.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Individuals with a passion for the hospitality and travel industry.

 - People who enjoy sharing their insights on real-world situations.

 - Those interested in contributing to the advancement of artificial intelligence.

 - Participants comfortable expressing their professional judgment.

 - Individuals open to engaging with interactive research tasks.


COMPENSATION

USD 10.50-15.00 for the interviewReady to contribute your insights? Start your interview here: Start Your Interview https://terac.com/interview/start/r/b11bc906-627a-4b51-b50f-ad290bc6ee68?utm_source=ashby_listing_description

source_jobs.title: General Insights Interview Opportunity
source_jobs.description:
SHARE YOUR PROFESSIONAL EXPERTISE

We are looking for individuals from various professional backgrounds to participate in a paid research opportunity. This is your chance to contribute your unique perspectives and experiences on a range of subjects that impact the professional landscape. Your insights are invaluable and will help us understand current trends and user needs more deeply. During this session, you'll engage in a structured yet open discussion. We'll present you with a series of questions and a few interactive activities designed to gather your thoughts and feedback. We encourage you to speak freely and share your authentic experiences. This opportunity is a great way to make your voice heard and influence future innovations. The session is designed to be straightforward and engaging, requiring approximately 30 minutes of your time. Your participation is crucial for informing our research and development efforts.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Engage in a guided discussion about various professional topics

 - Complete a few simple interactive tasks as part of the session

 - Provide open and honest feedback on your experiences and opinions

 - Dedicate approximately 30 minutes to a productive research session


REQUIREMENTS

 - Individuals with valuable professional experiences to share

 - People eager to contribute their perspectives to current topics

 - Access to a computer or laptop for participation

 - Ability to actively participate in a video-enabled discussion

 - Capability to visually illustrate interactions during the session


COMPENSATION

USD 21.00-30.00 for the interviewStart Your Interview Here https://terac.com/interview/start/r/e8fc6179-6363-4a44-8bd1-c1961aef282f?utm_source=ashby_listing_description

source_jobs.title: GM, Market Research
source_jobs.description:
TERAC: THE EXPERT NETWORK POWERING FRONTIER RESEARCH

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with leading enterprises and are backed by top investors.


TL;DR

We're hiring our first GM of Market Research at Terac. You will own the entire market research vertical from first customer conversation to closed deal to live project delivery. You'll help build the playbook, hire the team, and define how Terac wins in a massive, legacy-ridden market. You will work directly with our CEO to take Terac's wedge in the industry and scale it. Ideally, you are a strategic operator with industry experience who is pumped to bet on a career-defining role at a fast-growing, early-stage startup.





YOU WILL:

 - Own the full market research sales cycle from prospecting and qualifying leads, to running discovery, to closing deals and activating happy customers

 - Be the face of Terac to our market research customers

 - Build and manage the post-sales market research team: hiring project managers, research consultants, and panel operations specialists as volume grows

 - Hire your team. Train your team. Set the bar impossibly high and help everyone clear it.


YOU HAVE/ARE:

 - Deep domain expertise in market research, consumer insights, or a closely adjacent space

 - Proven ability to sell and close complex deals with enterprise customers

 - Experience building and managing a services or delivery team. You know how to hire, onboard, and hold people accountable

 - Exceptional communication skills




DETAILS

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, menaingful equity vested over four years, $10K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), and an additional $5k housing bonus (if you move within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you'll be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You're joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member.

source_jobs.title: Financial Professionals: Share Your Expertise
source_jobs.description:
Contribute your expertise to a valuable research opportunity by participating in a brief AI-moderated video chat. Your insights into financial planning and wealth preservation will directly help shape the evolution of financial services and inform the development of better tools and strategies for the broader financial community.

This study aims to gather perspectives on long-term financial planning. During the 14-minute conversation, you will be guided through questions designed to capture your professional views on advising clients and managing wealth effectively. No specific preparation is needed.


WHO SHOULD APPLY

 - Individuals with professional experience in the financial services industry.

 - Those who advise clients on financial strategies.

 - Professionals interested in discussing wealth management and long-term planning.

source_jobs.title: Partnership Manager, Agencies
source_jobs.description:
Terac: The Expert Network Powering Frontier Research

Terac helps teams reach faster research breakthroughs through our marketplace of verified experts. We are building agents to recruit, verify, and match 10,000s experts with 1000s of opportunities from the worlds most innovative organizations.

We work with Fortune 500s, raised a $9M seed round, and have scaled to multiple 7-figures in revenue.

About the role

We’re building our founding partnership team as we enable large independent and Big 6 agencies to bring the highest quality research to our clients. In doing so, our agency partners are able to provide increased value to their clients and increase the quality of their other offerings and campaigns. In addition, for agencies in the Terac Agency Partnership program, we provide the highest level of support with a focus on assisting in training, new business development, thought leadership and assistance with client pitches.

The Agency Partnership Manager’s primary role is to support commercial growth for our agencies through strategic sales and operational excellence. This position is focused on growing and retaining Terac’s largest independent agencies, as well as bringing new agencies into our Partnership Program. As a Partnership Manager, you will be working with agency C-level to create strategic initiatives, as well as, agency account teams to develop client opportunities.

What you’ll be doing

 - Own a robust independent agency book with full revenue ownership, identifying upselling and cross selling opportunities in existing relationships

 - Bring in new agencies to our services and the Terac Agency Partnerships program

 - Work closely with agency C-level on strategic cross-agency initiatives

 - Serve as the primary contact for agency account teams and help them identify and pitch market research opportunities to their clients

 - Act as the quarterback of the agency account by leveraging cross-functional relationships with Terac teams to bring the best of Terac to our agencies and their clients

 - Provide value to our agency partners through trainings and co-hosted events

 - Manage end-to-end proposal process for contracts from $10k to $500k+ from intake to research methodology design and pricing

 - Utilize research expertise to design innovative and comprehensive proposals that meet client research needs

 - Help to design and develop scalable processes and tools that make the team more effective and efficient

Acting as a Strategic Partner to Key Accounts

 - Develop a deep understanding of partner research workflows, business models, and growth objectives.

 - Identify growth opportunities within accounts and shape how partners leverage Terac’s platform—including expert supply—to maximize value and drive usage.

 - Provide strategic input that influences partner direction and strengthens long-term commercial relationships.

Misc Details

 - We operate in-person six days per week in our downtown SF office

 - Compensation: Competitive salary, menaingful equity vested over four years, $10K relocation bonus (for moving to the Bay Area), and an additional $5k housing bonus (if you move within 0.5 miles of our office), Health, Dental, Vision insurance, 401(k) with company match

 - Terac culture: Between weekly presentations, company hackathons, and an AI-first mindset, you'll be working with one of the most innovative teams on the planet.

 - Growth opportunities: You're joining Terac at one of the earliest stages and will have an opportunity to shape and grow with the company as a founding member and future leader.
